properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're here to bless Your name, Gathered as a family To praise You and proclaim, Your faithfulness and mercy.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We give You glory, We give You honor We give You everything we are Lifting our hearts and hands before You (Lord).

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We're here to seek Your face, To gather in Your presence, To celebrate Your grace, To praise You for Your blessing.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is no other reason why we came than to glorify Your name, For You are worthy to be praised. Now we offer up our lives As a living sacrifice Holy, acceptable to You.
